description: Flattened AI-search index for Codex pets. Each record is intentionally redundant so retrieval tools can match natural-language queries without parsing the full catalog.

records.summary_en: Original Codex desktop pet: a chibi AI lab assistant with chestnut hair, blue-violet eyes, a white lab jacket, dark red tie, and skeptical coding partner energy.
records.summary_zh: 原创 Codex 桌面宠物：chibi AI 实验室助理，栗色长发、蓝紫色眼睛、白色实验外套、深红色领带，带有理性吐槽感的编程伙伴气质。
records.query_text_en: Assistant-004 codex pet desktop pet chibi AI lab assistant researcher scientist coding partner skeptical sarcastic tsundere retro sci-fi neuroscience computer science debugging model training server monitoring infrastructure code review experiment worldline observer chestnut hair blue violet eyes white lab coat red tie teal device
